com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.pinentry

Class ExtendedExtPINEntryParams

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.pinentry.ExtPINEntryParameters
      • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.pinentry.ExtendedExtPINEntryParams

  • public class ExtendedExtPINEntryParams
extends ExtPINEntryParameters
    Extended class for the "New PIN Entry" instruct.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      ExtendedExtPINEntryParams() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      byte[] getAdditionalData()
      Gets the additional data for the PIN process.
      int getMinLen()
      Gets the minimum pin length of the pin entry process.
      Alignment getPinMessageAlignment()
      Gets the alignment of the PIN messages.
      PINMessageMode getPinMessageMode()
      Gets the PIN messages display mode.
      SessionType getSessionType()
      Gets the session type of the PIN process.
      boolean isCheckIcPresent()
      Gets whether to check IC present when performed PIN process.
      void setAdditionalData(byte[] additionalData)
      Sets the additional data for the PIN process.
      void setCheckIcPresent(boolean checkIcPresent)
      Sets whether to check IC present when performed PIN process.
      void setMinLen(int minLen)
      Sets the minimum pin length of the pin entry process.
      void setPinMessageAlignment(Alignment pinMessageAlignment)
      Sets the alignment of the PIN messages.
      void setPinMessageMode(PINMessageMode pinMessageMode)
      Sets the PIN messages display mode.
      void setSessionType(SessionType sessionType)
      Sets the session type of the PIN process.

    • Constructor Detail

      • ExtendedExtPINEntryParams

        public ExtendedExtPINEntryParams()

    • Method Detail

      • getMinLen

        public int getMinLen()
        Gets the minimum pin length of the pin entry process.
        Returns:
        The minimum pin length of the pin entry process.

      • setMinLen

        public void setMinLen(int minLen)
        Sets the minimum pin length of the pin entry process.
        Parameters:
        minLen - The minimum pin length of the pin entry process.

      • getPinMessageMode

        public PINMessageMode getPinMessageMode()
        Gets the PIN messages display mode.
        Returns:
        The PIN messages display mode. See PINMessageMode.

      • setPinMessageMode

        public void setPinMessageMode(PINMessageMode pinMessageMode)
        Sets the PIN messages display mode.
        Parameters:
        pinMessageMode - The PIN messages display mode. See PINMessageMode, default is PINMessageMode.DEFAULT.

      • getPinMessageAlignment

        public Alignment getPinMessageAlignment()
        Gets the alignment of the PIN messages.
        Returns:
        The alignment of the PIN messages. See Alignment.

      • setPinMessageAlignment

        public void setPinMessageAlignment(Alignment pinMessageAlignment)
        Sets the alignment of the PIN messages.
        Parameters:
        pinMessageAlignment - The alignment of the PIN messages. See Alignment, default is Alignment.Left.

      • getAdditionalData

        public byte[] getAdditionalData()
        Gets the additional data for the PIN process.
        Returns:
        The additional data for the PIN process.

      • setAdditionalData

        public void setAdditionalData(byte[] additionalData)
        Sets the additional data for the PIN process.
        Parameters:
        additionalData - The additional data for the PIN process.

      • getSessionType

        public SessionType getSessionType()
        Gets the session type of the PIN process.
        Returns:
        The session type of the PIN process.

      • setSessionType

        public void setSessionType(SessionType sessionType)
        Sets the session type of the PIN process.
        Parameters:
        sessionType - The session type of the PIN process. See SessionType.

      • isCheckIcPresent

        public boolean isCheckIcPresent()
        Gets whether to check IC present when performed PIN process.
        Returns:
        Whether to check IC present when performed PIN process.

      • setCheckIcPresent

        public void setCheckIcPresent(boolean checkIcPresent)
        Sets whether to check IC present when performed PIN process.

        Note: This is only valid with "startOnlinePINEntry".

        Parameters:
        checkIcPresent - Whether to check IC present when performed PIN process.
